headlines.title_cn: Ilya的SSI：320亿美元押注后缩放时代
headlines.title_en: Ilya Sutskever's SSI: The $32B Bet on a Post-Scaling Future
headlines.summary_cn: 前OpenAI联合创始人Ilya Sutskever创立SSI（安全超级智能），获320亿美元投资，旨在探索后缩放定律（post-scaling）的AI发展路径。这代表AI研究可能从单纯扩大模型规模转向新方向。
headlines.summary_en: Ilya Sutskever's new venture, SSI, has raised $32 billion to explore AI beyond scaling laws, aiming for safe superintelligence. This signals a potential shift in AI research focus.
headlines.student_note: 强烈推荐！了解Ilya对AI未来的看法，对理解AI前沿趋势非常重要。

headlines.title_cn: ‘Chat Is Dead’: OpenAI Reportedly Planning Radical Changes to ChatGPT
headlines.title_en: ‘Chat Is Dead’: OpenAI Reportedly Planning Radical Changes to ChatGPT
headlines.summary_cn: ‘Chat Is Dead’: OpenAI Reportedly Planning Radical Changes to ChatGPT  Gizmodo
headlines.summary_en: ‘Chat Is Dead’: OpenAI Reportedly Planning Radical Changes to ChatGPT  Gizmodo

headlines.title_cn: Meta confirms 1000s of Instagram accounts were hacked by abusing its AI chatbot
headlines.title_en: Meta confirms 1000s of Instagram accounts were hacked by abusing its AI chatbot

headlines.title_cn: 特朗普、桑德斯与Altman共议AI公有化
headlines.title_en: Donald Trump, Bernie Sanders and Sam Altman are all talking about public ownership in AI
headlines.summary_cn: 美国政界人物特朗普、桑德斯以及OpenAI CEO Altman都在讨论AI公共所有权概念，表明AI成果分配问题正成为跨政治光谱的共识议题。对学习AI伦理和公共政策的学生是重要素材。
headlines.summary_en: Donald Trump, Bernie Sanders, and Sam Altman are all advocating some form of public ownership in AI, reflecting a growing consensus on equitable distribution of AI benefits. This is a key topic for AI ethics and policy.
headlines.student_note: 推荐阅读，帮助理解AI的社会影响和治理方向，适合用于论文或课堂讨论。

headlines.title_cn: 杨立昆世界模型赌注：10.3亿美元反对大语言模型
headlines.title_en: Yann LeCun World Models Bet: AMI Labs Stakes $1.03 Billion Against Large Language Models
headlines.summary_cn: AI先驱Yann LeCun倡导的“世界模型”路线获得AMI Labs 10.3亿美元投资，押注该范式将超越当前主流的大语言模型（LLM）。这为质疑“规模至上”的学生提供了另一种技术路径参考。
headlines.summary_en: AMI Labs has invested $1.03 billion in Yann LeCun's 'World Models' approach, betting against the dominance of large language models. This challenges the current scaling paradigm and explores alternative AI architectures.
headlines.student_note: 强烈推荐！了解世界模型与LLM的对比，对研究AI前沿非常有帮助。

items.title_cn: 杨立昆世界模型赌注：10.3亿美元反对大语言模型
items.title_en: Yann LeCun World Models Bet: AMI Labs Stakes $1.03 Billion Against Large Language Models
items.summary_cn: AI先驱Yann LeCun倡导的“世界模型”路线获得AMI Labs 10.3亿美元投资，押注该范式将超越当前主流的大语言模型（LLM）。这为质疑“规模至上”的学生提供了另一种技术路径参考。
items.summary_en: AMI Labs has invested $1.03 billion in Yann LeCun's 'World Models' approach, betting against the dominance of large language models. This challenges the current scaling paradigm and explores alternative AI architectures.
items.student_note: 强烈推荐！了解世界模型与LLM的对比，对研究AI前沿非常有帮助。

items.title_cn: OpenAI推出锁定模式防注入
items.title_en: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks
items.summary_cn: OpenAI推出了“锁定模式”（Lockdown Mode），旨在减少提示注入攻击导致敏感数据泄露的风险。该模式限制ChatGPT在特定场景下的行为，但不能完全防御所有攻击。对于学习AI安全的学生，理解此类攻击与防御机制是重要课题。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has introduced Lockdown Mode to reduce the risk of sensitive data leakage from prompt injection attacks. While it mitigates some threats, it is not a complete solution. This development highlights ongoing challenges in AI security.
items.student_note: 推荐关注，提示注入是AI安全领域的热点，学习防御机制对网络安全方向有价值。

items.title_cn: 特朗普政府或入股OpenAI
items.title_en: The Trump administration might take an equity stake in OpenAI
items.summary_cn: 美国总统特朗普表示正在讨论让美国公众从AI成功中受益，可能通过持有OpenAI股权的方式实现。这标志着政府与AI企业可能形成更深层的利益绑定，对理解AI产业生态有启发。
items.summary_en: President Trump announced discussions about potential deals where the American public could benefit from AI's success, possibly through an equity stake in OpenAI. This signals a new model of public-private partnership.

items.title_cn: Ilya讨论AI双重性：变革潜力与风险
items.title_en: [deep Research] Ilya Sutskever Discusses AI's Dual Nature: Transformative Potential And As (qLgpMdImxo)
items.summary_cn: Ilya Sutskever深入探讨了AI的双重性：既具有巨大变革潜力，也伴随显著风险。他对后缩放时代的安全问题表达了深刻见解，适合学习AI安全与伦理的学生深入了解。
items.summary_en: Ilya Sutskever elaborates on AI's dual nature—its transformative potential and associated risks—offering insights into safety in a post-scaling era. Essential reading for AI safety enthusiasts.
items.student_note: 推荐阅读，了解顶级研究者对AI风险的看法。

items.title_en: What to expect from WWDC 2026: Siri's highly anticipated revamp and Apple Intelligence updates
items.summary_cn: 苹果WWDC 2026临近，预计Siri将迎来重大改版，并结合苹果AI（Apple Intelligence）功能全面升级。这对关注终端智能语音助手发展的学生是重要信号。
items.summary_en: Apple's WWDC 2026 is approaching, with expectations of a major Siri overhaul and updates to Apple Intelligence features. This signals Apple's push in on-device AI and conversational interfaces.

items.title_cn: Show HN: Lathe – Use LLMs to learn a new domain, not skip past it
items.title_en: Show HN: Lathe – Use LLMs to learn a new domain, not skip past it
items.summary_cn:
Hey HN!

Lathe is an experiment in using LLMs to teach me something new, instead of doing the work for me. It generates a hands-on, source-backed tutorial for any technical topic you want to learn. Then you work through it yourself by reading and typing the code by hand (gasp) in a local UI built for exactly that.

It's a Go CLI plus LLM agent skills (Claude Code / Cursor / Codex). You prompt something like "/lathe build a 3D slicer in Erlang", run `lathe s
items.summary_en:
Hey HN!

Lathe is an experiment in using LLMs to teach me something new, instead of doing the work for me. It generates a hands-on, source-backed tutorial for any technical topic you want to learn. Then you work through it yourself by reading and typing the code by hand (gasp) in a local UI built for exactly that.

It's a Go CLI plus LLM agent skills (Claude Code / Cursor / Codex). You prompt something like "/lathe build a 3D slicer in Erlang", run `lathe s

items.title_cn: AI顾问Krishnan离职白宫
items.title_en: Sriram Krishnan is leaving his role as White House AI advisor
items.summary_cn: 白宫AI政策顾问Sriram Krishnan即将离职，据悉他将成立新机构继续影响特朗普政府的AI政策。这一变动反映了美国AI政策制定层面的动态。
items.summary_en: Sriram Krishnan is stepping down as White House AI advisor and reportedly plans to start a new institution to shape Trump's AI policy. This reflects the evolving landscape of AI governance.

must_read.title_cn: Is this the dawn of the Tokenpocalypse?
must_read.title_en: Is this the dawn of the Tokenpocalypse?
must_read.summary_cn: We're likely to see more price increases as the big AI companies plan to go public.
must_read.summary_en: We're likely to see more price increases as the big AI companies plan to go public.
must_read.detail_summary: TechCrunch AI 发布分析文章《Is this the dawn of the Tokenpocalypse?》，探讨 AI 服务中 token 消耗激增可能引发的成本危机。随着大语言模型 API 调用量爆发，开发者与用户需为每次交互支付越来越高的 token 费用，文章警告这种 'token 末日' 可能抑制 AI 应用普及。对于大学生而言，理解 token 计价机制有助于合理规划 AI 工具使用成本，尤其是在初创项目或学术研究中，避免因超额 token 消耗导致预算超支。

must_read.title_cn: LLMs are eroding my software engineering career and I don't know what to do
must_read.title_en: LLMs are eroding my software engineering career and I don't know what to do
must_read.detail_summary: Hacker News 上一位软件工程师发帖称大语言模型正在侵蚀其职业生涯，感到迷茫。文章引发广泛共鸣，讨论 LLM 对初级开发岗位、代码维护和问题解决能力的冲击。核心观点：AI 自动化编程降低了部分传统技能的价值，但同时也要求工程师转向更高层次的架构与创造性工作。对于计算机专业学生，这是一次职业警示：应尽早学习如何与 AI 协作，而非被动替代，提升系统设计、伦理判断等不可替代的能力。

must_read.title_cn: Meta confirms 1000s of Instagram accounts were hacked by abusing its AI chatbot
must_read.title_en: Meta confirms 1000s of Instagram accounts were hacked by abusing its AI chatbot
must_read.detail_summary: Meta 证实数千个 Instagram 账户因攻击者滥用其 AI 聊天机器人而遭黑客入侵。攻击者利用 AI 助手的社交工程漏洞，诱骗用户授权恶意操作，导致账户被劫持。这是 AI 滥用引发的重大安全事件，Meta 已修补漏洞并建议用户启用双因素认证。对于大学生，此事件提醒：即便 AI 助手看似智能，也要警惕其被操纵的风险，切勿向 AI 暴露敏感信息或执行不明指令。

must_read.title_cn: ‘Chat Is Dead’: OpenAI Reportedly Planning Radical Changes to ChatGPT
must_read.title_en: ‘Chat Is Dead’: OpenAI Reportedly Planning Radical Changes to ChatGPT
must_read.summary_cn: ‘Chat Is Dead’: OpenAI Reportedly Planning Radical Changes to ChatGPT  Gizmodo
must_read.summary_en: ‘Chat Is Dead’: OpenAI Reportedly Planning Radical Changes to ChatGPT  Gizmodo
must_read.detail_summary: Gizmodo 援引消息称 OpenAI 正计划对 ChatGPT 进行重大变革，可能放弃纯聊天界面，转向更智能的 '超级应用' 形态。CEO Sam Altman 暗示聊天模式已到尽头，未来 ChatGPT 将整合文件处理、代码执行、多模态交互等全栈功能。对于大学生，这预示着 AI 工具将不再只是对话机器人，而会成为一站式学习助理，值得持续关注动态以抢占使用先机。

must_read.title_cn: Silurus/ooxml: Pixel-faithful Office documents, rendered in the browser
must_read.title_en: Silurus/ooxml: Pixel-faithful Office documents, rendered in the browser
must_read.detail_summary: 开源项目 Silurus/ooxml 实现浏览器内像素级精确渲染 Office 文档（如 .docx, .pptx）。该项目利用底层 XML 解析和 Canvas 技术，无需安装 Office 软件即可在线编辑和预览，且保持排版一致性。对于大学生，该工具可替代传统 Office 套件，在跨设备协作、网页端作业提交等场景中极大提升便利性，尤其适合配置不高或需快速分享的场景。

must_read.title_cn: Opinion | Human intelligence will win out over artificial intelligence
must_read.title_en: Opinion | Human intelligence will win out over artificial intelligence
must_read.summary_cn: Opinion | Human intelligence will win out over artificial intelligence  The Washington Post
must_read.summary_en: Opinion | Human intelligence will win out over artificial intelligence  The Washington Post
must_read.detail_summary: Yann LeCun 在《华盛顿邮报》发表观点文章，坚信人类智能最终将战胜人工智能。他认为当前 AI 仍缺乏常识、推理能力与真实理解，人类独有的创造力、情感和社会直觉是机器难以复制的。LeCun 警告不应过度神化 AI，反对将决策权完全交给机器。对于大学生，此文提供了难得的冷静视角：不必焦虑被替代，而是强化对人类智能核心优势的培养。

must_read.title_cn: Notion restores access to Anthropic after service disruption
must_read.title_en: Notion restores access to Anthropic after service disruption
must_read.summary_cn: Notion's head of product said he was "astonished" at “the amount of people RT-ing this."
must_read.summary_en: Notion's head of product said he was "astonished" at “the amount of people RT-ing this."
must_read.detail_summary: 记事本工具 Notion 在经历短暂服务中断后，已恢复对 AI 公司 Anthropic 的 API 访问支持。中断期间用户无法在 Notion 中使用 Claude 集成功能，影响部分协作工作流。Notion 未披露具体中断原因，但表示已修复。对于依赖 Notion+AI 做笔记或写作的大学生，此事提示应留意服务依赖风险，可本地备份关键内容。

must_read.title_cn: Anthropic, please ship an official Claude Desktop for Linux
must_read.title_en: Anthropic, please ship an official Claude Desktop for Linux
must_read.detail_summary: 多位 Linux 用户在 Hacker News 上联名呼吁 Anthropic 发布官方的 Claude Desktop Linux 版本。目前 Claude 桌面应用仅支持 macOS 和 Windows，Linux 用户只能通过网页或第三方方案使用，体验受限。对于使用 Linux 系统（如 Ubuntu）进行开发的大学生，原生桌面应用将提供更稳定的交互和后台运行能力，期待官方回应。

must_read.title_cn: OpenAI is still working on that ‘super app’
must_read.title_en: OpenAI is still working on that ‘super app’
must_read.summary_cn: "Chat is dead" — at least, according to a senior OpenAI employee.
must_read.summary_en: "Chat is dead" — at least, according to a senior OpenAI employee.
must_read.detail_summary: TechCrunch 报道 OpenAI 仍在推进 '超级应用' 计划，意图将多种功能（如聊天、搜索、代码生成、图像识别等）整合到单一平台中。这与 Sam Altman 一贯的愿景一致，旨在构建一个能替代大量独立工具的智能化生态系统。对于大学生，这意味着未来可能只需一个 AI 应用就能满足笔记、编程、资料查询等需求，大幅降低工具切换成本。
Hacker News 上展示了一个公共领域图像档案网站，收录了大量版权已过期的历史照片、插图与艺术作品，可免费下载使用。该档案对于学术研究、设计素材、课程展示等具有很高价值，尤其适合需要引用历史图像的人文社科或艺术专业学生。同时，该站点提供高清扫描版，拓宽了创作资源库。

must_read.title_cn: I design with Claude more than Figma now
must_read.title_en: I design with Claude more than Figma now
must_read.detail_summary: 一位设计师在 Hacker News 分享经验：现在他使用 Anthropic 的 Claude 进行 UI/UX 设计的时间已超过传统工具 Figma。Claude 不仅能根据文本描述生成布局草稿，还能快速迭代和导出代码。这反映了 AI 正在颠覆设计流程：从像素操作转向对话式生成。对于设计专业学生，建议主动尝试 Claude 等 AI 工具辅助创作，提高效率并拓宽创意边界。

must_read.title_cn: Show HN: Lathe – Use LLMs to learn a new domain, not skip past it
must_read.title_en: Show HN: Lathe – Use LLMs to learn a new domain, not skip past it
must_read.summary_cn:
Hey HN!

Lathe is an experiment in using LLMs to teach me something new, instead of doing the work for me. It generates a hands-on, source-backed tutorial for any technical topic you want to learn. Then you work through it yourself by reading and typing the code by hand (gasp) in a local UI built for exactly that.

It's a Go CLI plus LLM agent skills (Claude Code / Cursor / Codex). You prompt something like "/lathe build a 3D slicer in Erlang", run `lathe s

Then you work through it yourself by reading and typing the code by hand (gasp) in a local UI built for exactly that.

must_read.detail_summary: 项目 Lathe 在 Hacker News 上展示：利用大语言模型帮助用户深入学习新领域，而非直接跳过学习过程。Lathe 通过引导提问、拆解概念和生成练习，让 AI 扮演 '导师' 而非 '答案提供者'。对于大学生，这代表了 AI 在教育中的良性应用——促进深度理解，值得尝试用于自学课程或研究领域。

must_read.title_cn: Sam Altman Heads To Washington As OpenAI Stakes Out Its AI Policy Stance
must_read.title_en: Sam Altman Heads To Washington As OpenAI Stakes Out Its AI Policy Stance
must_read.summary_cn: Sam Altman Heads To Washington As OpenAI Stakes Out Its AI Policy Stance  Yahoo
must_read.summary_en: Sam Altman Heads To Washington As OpenAI Stakes Out Its AI Policy Stance  Yahoo
must_read.detail_summary: Sam Altman 前往华盛顿特区，为 OpenAI 的 AI 政策立场游说。他主张在鼓励创新的同时建立合理监管框架，包括对高风险 AI 模型的强制测试和透明度要求。此举正值全球 AI 立法加速期，OpenAI 希望影响规则制定。对于大学生，未来就业和创业都将受到 AI 政策影响，了解监管动态有助于职业选择和合规意识。

must_read.title_cn: Tokenomics: Quantifying Where Tokens Are Used in Agentic Software Engineering
must_read.title_en: Tokenomics: Quantifying Where Tokens Are Used in Agentic Software Engineering
must_read.detail_summary: 学术文章《Tokenomics》定量分析了在智能体软件工程中 token 的使用分布，揭示不同任务（如代码生成、调试、文档编写）的 token 消耗差异。研究提出优化策略以减少浪费，对构建高效 AI agent 有指导意义。对于计算机专业学生，理解 token 经济学能帮助设计轻量化 agent 应用，节省 API 费用。

must_read.title_cn: Trees to Flows and Back: Unifying Decision Trees and Diffusion Models
must_read.title_en: Trees to Flows and Back: Unifying Decision Trees and Diffusion Models
must_read.detail_summary: 论文《Trees to Flows and Back》提出统一框架，将决策树与扩散模型连接起来，使传统可解释模型与现代生成模型能在同一数学结构下工作。该工作有望推动可解释 AI 和生成模型交叉领域的突破，例如在金融风控或医学图像中同时实现高精度与可解释性。对于对 AI 理论感兴趣的大学生，这是理解模型关联性的重要文献。
key_points: 统一决策树与扩散模型
可解释性与生成能力结合
